mapper.insert: INSERT INTO lecture ( member_id, major_id, year, semester, name, credit, type, ref_books, goal, weekly_plan, academic_year, max_std, rem_std, start_date, end_date ) VALUES ( #{loginUserId}, #{majorId}, #{year}, #{semester}, #{lectureName}, #{credit}, #{lectureType}, #{refBooks}, #{goal}, #{weeklyPlan}, #{academicYear}, #{maxStd}, #{maxStd}, #{startDate}, #{endDate} )

INSERT INTO lecture_schedule ( lecture_id, room_id, day_of_week, start_period, end_period ) VALUES ( #{lectureId}, (SELECT room_id FROM lecture_room WHERE room_number = #{roomNumber} LIMIT 1), #{dayOfWeek}, #{startPeriod}, #{endPeriod} )
mapper.select: SELECT l.semester, l.year, l.lecture_id AS lectureId, l.type AS lectureType, mj.name AS majorName, l.name AS lectureName, m.name AS proName, l.credit, ls.day_of_week AS dayOfWeek, ls.end_period AS endPeriod, ls.start_period AS startPeriod, lr.building, lr.room_number AS roomNumber, l.academic_year AS academicYear, l.status FROM lecture l LEFT JOIN member m ON l.member_id = m.member_id LEFT JOIN major mj ON l.major_id = mj.major_id LEFT JOIN lecture_schedule ls ON l.lecture_id = ls.lecture_id LEFT JOIN lecture_room lr ON ls.room_id = lr.room_id ORDER BY l.lecture_id DESC

SELECT c.member_id AS memberId, l.lecture_id AS lectureId, l.type AS lectureType, mj.name AS majorName, l.name AS lectureName, m.name AS proName, l.credit, ls.day_of_week AS dayOfWeek, ls.end_period AS endPeriod, ls.start_period AS startPeriod, lr.building, lr.room_number AS roomNumber, l.academic_year AS academicYear, l.status, l.semester, l.year FROM course c JOIN lecture l ON c.lecture_id = l.lecture_id LEFT JOIN member m ON l.member_id = m.member_id LEFT JOIN major mj ON l.major_id = mj.major_id LEFT JOIN lecture_schedule ls ON l.lecture_id = ls.lecture_id LEFT JOIN lecture_room lr ON ls.room_id = lr.room_id WHERE c.member_id = #{loginUserId} ORDER BY l.lecture_id DESC

select l.member_id AS memberId, mem.name AS proName, l.lecture_id, l.name AS lectureName, l.year, l.semester, l.type AS lectureType, l.credit, l.max_std AS maxStd, l.academic_year AS academicYear, l.ref_books AS refBooks, l.goal, l.weekly_plan AS weeklyPlan, lr.building, lr.room_number AS roomNumber, ls.day_of_week AS dayOfWeek, ls.end_period AS endPeriod, ls.start_period AS startPeriod, l.status, l.major_id AS majorId, m.name AS majorName
from lecture l left join member mem on l.member_id = mem.member_id left join lecture_schedule ls on l.lecture_id=ls.lecture_id left join lecture_room lr on ls.room_id=lr.room_id LEFT JOIN major m ON l.major_id = m.major_id WHERE l.lecture_id = #{lectureId}

SELECT l.lecture_id AS lectureId, l.member_id AS loginUserId, l.name AS lectureName, l.year, l.semester, l.type AS lectureType, l.credit, l.max_std AS maxStd, l.academic_year AS academicYear, l.ref_books AS refBooks, l.goal, l.weekly_plan AS weeklyPlan, l.status, l.major_id AS majorId, mj.name AS majorName, ls.day_of_week AS dayOfWeek, ls.start_period AS startPeriod, ls.end_period AS endPeriod, lr.building, lr.room_number AS roomNumber FROM lecture l LEFT JOIN lecture_schedule ls ON l.lecture_id = ls.lecture_id LEFT JOIN lecture_room lr ON ls.room_id = lr.room_id LEFT JOIN major mj ON l.major_id = mj.major_id WHERE l.lecture_id = #{lectureId}
mapper.update: UPDATE lecture SET major_id = #{req.majorId}, name = #{req.lectureName}, credit = #{req.credit}, type = #{req.lectureType}, ref_books = #{req.refBooks}, goal = #{req.goal}, weekly_plan = #{req.weeklyPlan}, academic_year = #{req.academicYear}, max_std = #{req.maxStd}, semester = #{req.semester}, year = #{req.year} WHERE lecture_id = #{lectureId}

UPDATE lecture_schedule SET room_id = (SELECT room_id FROM lecture_room WHERE room_number = #{req.roomNumber} LIMIT 1), day_of_week = #{req.dayOfWeek}, start_period = #{req.startPeriod}, end_period = #{req.endPeriod} WHERE lecture_id = #{lectureId}
mapper.select: SELECT ma.`name` AS majorName, m.`code` AS studentCode, m.`name` AS studentName, s.academic_year AS academicYear, c.grade_letter AS gradeLetter, c.lecture_id AS lectureId FROM course c JOIN student s ON c.member_id = s.member_id JOIN major ma ON s.major_id = ma.major_id JOIN member m ON s.member_id = m.member_id WHERE c.lecture_id = #{req.lectureId} ORDER BY m.`name` ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course WHERE lecture_id = #{lectureId}
